zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Pembridge於1372年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾布利其時，她的父親John Pembridge45歲，母親Sybill Essath52歲。她於1392年與Sir Thomas Oldcastle在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1415年2月3日在英國賀福爾維奧布利享年43歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Pembridge于1372年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾布利其时，她的父亲John Pembridge45岁，母亲Sybill Essath52岁。她于1392年与Sir Thomas Oldcastle在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1415年2月3日在英国賀福爾維奧布利享年43岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Pembridge was born in 1372, in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Pembridge, was 45 and her mother, Sybill Essath, was 52. She married Sir Thomas Oldcastle in 1392, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 3 February 1415, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in England.

fr.Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Pembridge est née en 1372, à Pembridge, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Pembridge, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Sybill Essath, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Oldcastle en 1392, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1415, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Pembridge 1372 in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Pembridge 45 und ihre Mutter Sybill Essath 52. Sie hat 1392 in England Sir Thomas Oldcastle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1415 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Weobley, Herefordshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pembridge è nata il nel 1372 nel Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Pembridge, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Sybill Essath, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Oldcastle nel 1392, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1415, nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Pembridgeが1372年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアペンブリッジで生まれた時，父John Pembridgeは45歳，母Sybill Essathは52歳であった。1392年にイギリスでSir Thomas Oldcastleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1415年2月3日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで43歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Pembridge(이)가 1372년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 p브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Pembridge(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybill Essath(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1392년 영국에서 Sir Thomas Oldcastle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1415년 2월 3일 영국 허퍼드실르 w오블리에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pembridge nasceu em 1372, em Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Pembridge, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Sybill Essath, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Oldcastle em 1392, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1415, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Pembridge родилась в 1372 г. в местности пембридж, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Pembridge было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybill Essath, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Oldcastle в 1392 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 3 февраля 1415 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Pembridge nació en 1372, en Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Pembridge, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Sybill Essath, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Oldcastle en 1392, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1415, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
